Now

← Back to home

Last updated: March 2026 · Inspired by nownownow.com

This is a list of what I am doing right now — what I am working on and focusing on.

Client Projects

  • ErikKorte.nl — Last stages of refactoring and rebuilding a WordPress site for a Dutch funeral home. Including a custom condolances plugin. Before: erikkorte.nl · After: Staging
  • farbest.com — A custom WordPress plugin to filter ingredients.

Personal Projects

Projects I'm working on for myself — for fun, learning, and experimenting.

  • Photo Grid Maker — A photo grid maker for my Liene Photo Printer. A fun side project I use every month.
  • maggiematters.com — Documentation of my life with cancer. Experimenting with Google Analytics, WordPress Theme TwentyTwentyFive and technical SEO.
  • Funfinder732 — Using AI and LLMs to help parents find things to do with kids in New Jersey. Work in progress.
  • navesink.digital — Helping individuals and businesses organize their digital life.
  • navesinkwebsolutions.com — My small digital agency in New Jersey.

Courses, Books & Volunteering

  • TNBCThrivers — Volunteering as moderator for Metastatic TNBC Chats and community support.
  • Volunteering with WordPress — 4–8 hours/week on the Accessibility and Docs teams. Bug scrubs, documentation, meetings. My WP profile.
  • Building AI Agents and Agentic Workflows (3-part Coursera course) — Course 1 complete, now on course 2: Agentic AI with LangChain and LangGraph.
  • Book: Why We Sleep — Matthew Walker
  • Book: The Impossible Fortune — Richard Osman (Thursday Murder Club #5)

Previously Closed Projects

  • haymumford.com — Web hosting, DevOps and maintenance.
  • Modem.Work — Maintenance and update from Kirby 3 to Kirby 5.
  • happymeal.com — Developing and guiding migration to a WordPress project supporting 100+ locales.
  • McDonald's "As Featured In" — A WordPress campaign site using WPML, Timber and ACF.
  • ArtEZPress Shop — Custom WooCommerce theme with API connection to a WMS.
  • TopGear.com — WordPress theme development and support.
